title: Product Specialist
industry: AI / Private market data & deal sourcing platform (AI-powered)
requirements_met: Customer onboarding & success across calls/email/chat: Ryan has GTM and customer-facing experience
Technical problem-solving / guide users on integrations & advanced features: Ryan builds AI agents, technically literate
Bridge between customers and product/engineering teams (product feedback): Ryan generalist with product exposure
Work directly with investors and operators: Ryan has fundraising support + founder-facing background
gaps: Role is customer-success-leaning; a pure 'product builder/APM' would do more roadmap ownership than this position implies
preferred_met: Comfort with technical products and integrations: Ryan builds AI agents with Claude Code
Cross-functional GTM + product collaboration: Ryan's generalist background

preferred_skills.calculation: 20 * (2/3) = 13.3, rounded conservatively to reflect CS-leaning emphasis

industry_match.calculation: AI-powered data/deal-sourcing platform = direct AI industry match

salary_penalty.reason: From £39k but open-ended range; overlaps £50k minimum

notes: Specter Product Specialist = part customer success, part technical problem-solving, part product feedback; bridges customers and product/eng. AI-powered platform, HQ London. Apply via careers@tryspecter.com.
